title: E Commerce Main Image Dark Ancient Chinese Style
sourceTitle: E Commerce Main Image Dark Ancient Chinese Style Packaging

imagePrompts.prompt: {argument name="character" default="Pan Jinlian"}-inspired {argument name="product" default="arsenic"} packaging box design, ancient dark style, {argument name="theme" default="Water Margin"} peripheral cultural and creative product.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

{argument name="character" default="Pan Jinlian"}-inspired {argument name="product" default="arsenic"} packaging box design, ancient dark style, {argument name="theme" default="Water Margin"} peripheral cultural and creative product.
promptTranslations.fr:
Utilisez le prompt anglais ci-dessous pour générer l'image ; conservez les textes visibles, les noms de marque, les valeurs de variables et les paramètres en anglais.

{argument name="character" default="Pan Jinlian"}-inspired {argument name="product" default="arsenic"} packaging box design, ancient dark style, {argument name="theme" default="Water Margin"} peripheral cultural and creative product.
